pages.text: A $(bold)contraption$() is a group of blocks picked up and moved as one. To build one you $(bold)bind$() the blocks together, then attach a machine that does the moving.$(br2)$(li)$(bold)Super Glue$() — sticks adjacent blocks into one group.$(li)$(bold)Chassis$() (linear / radial) — binds a whole region at once, with a tunable range.
pages.title: Binding Blocks

pages.text: $(bold)The five movers:$()$(br)$(li)$(bold)Mechanical Bearing$() — spins a structure.$(li)$(bold)Mechanical Piston$() — slides it in a line.$(li)$(bold)Rope Pulley$() — raises and lowers it.$(li)$(bold)Gantry$() — moves it to a precise position.$(li)$(bold)Cart Assembler$() — mounts it on a minecart.$(br2)Each is covered next.
pages.title: The Movers
